title: OpenStack neutron
description: Configuration for the Neutron networking service (OpenStack-Helm neutron, release 2025.1). Only the fields here are settable on a Composition; everything else uses the chart defaults in values.yaml. Deploy all the OpenStack component blueprints into one namespace to form a complete install.

tunnel.title: Tunnel interface
tunnel.description: Host NIC used as the VXLAN tunnel endpoint (e.g. ens4 on GKE/GCE).
